_help: Foreigner-friendly Japan companies grouped by ATS provider. To add a company, drop in the slug used in its public job board URL. Greenhouse: https://boards.greenhouse.io/<slug> -> slug. Lever: https://jobs.lever.co/<slug> -> slug. Ashby: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/<board> -> board. Workable: https://apply.workable.com/<subdomain>/ -> subdomain. Entries in ashby/workable are EXAMPLES to verify and expand — confirm each board actually exists and posts Japan roles. All scrapers gracefully skip 404s, so wrong/old slugs are non-fatal. SmartRecruiters: careers.smartrecruiters.com/<companyId> -> companyId. Recruitee: https://<subdomain>.recruitee.com/ -> subdomain.

workable.name: Example Co (replace with a real Workable subdomain)

smartrecruiters.name: Example Co (replace with a real SmartRecruiters companyId)

recruitee.name: Example Co (replace with a real Recruitee subdomain)

careercross._help: Paste your saved-search URL here. Build one at https://www.careercross.com/en/job-search and the result page URL becomes /en/job-search/result/<sid>. The current value targets English Level = Native/Fluent/Business + Last Updated < 1 month.
